title: The Ultimatum Game Decision Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequential decision-making process and potential outcomes in the Ultimatum Game, highlighting the roles of the Proposer and Responder.
relationships: Proposer makes a Proposal to split a sum of money
Proposal includes an Offer amount for the Responder
Responder chooses to either Accept or Reject the offer
If Accepted, the money is split as proposed
If Rejected, both players receive nothing
